signals.npcLine: Crypto pulse sinking, trust low in shadowed markets.
signals.questPulse: Trace the falling tide of digital creds.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap flickers, values bleeding under pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Digits vanish as fear tightens its grip.

signals.npcLine: RAVE signal dead, ghost in the circuit.
signals.worldFeed: Inactive tokens flicker at zero score.
signals.clueEvent: Data packets vanish within static zones.

signals.npcLine: Fear index spikes as AITECH surges darkly.
signals.questPulse: Decode rising AI shadows in the net.
signals.worldFeed: Mistrust stirs, tech phantoms edge closer.
signals.clueEvent: Anomalous crypto wakes in fear’s wake.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID breaks ground; a new frontier lurks.
signals.questPulse: Chart unknown crypto outpost beyond fading stars.
signals.worldFeed: Markets murmur of unseen digital bodies.
signals.clueEvent: Fragments scatter where risk and value collide.

signals.npcLine: Pengu paddles through icy market fears.
signals.questPulse: Follow its trail to thaw cold digital seas.
signals.worldFeed: Small tokens navigate turbulent, frozen currents.
signals.clueEvent: Cold pockets form as trust dips low.
